name: ethara-team-task-manager
description: Team Task Manager - Full Stack Application

scripts.install-all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm run build && mkdir -p ../backend/public && cp -r dist/* ../backend/public/
scripts.build:win: cd frontend && npm run build && if not exist ..\backend\public mkdir ..\backend\public && xcopy dist\* ..\backend\public\ /s /e /y
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
